# Known reachable vulnerabilities, accepted until a fix is shippable.
# Consumed by scripts/vuln-scan.sh — the vuln-scan workflow fails only on
# reachable advisories NOT listed here. One GO-* ID per line; comments and
# blank lines ignored. Details: https://pkg.go.dev/vuln/<ID>
#
# Regenerate the raw list with: scripts/vuln-scan.sh --print
# Remove entries as they're fixed (the script flags stale ones).
#
# Currently EMPTY: the 2026-06-09 bump to Go 1.25 + nats-server v2.11.17
# cleared all 37 entries the Go 1.23 era carried (24 stdlib advisories
# whose fixes only shipped in Go 1.24/1.25, plus 13 in the embedded
# nats-server, fixed on the 2.11.x line which requires Go >= 1.24).
#
# When a new advisory lands with no shippable fix (toolchain pin, no
# upstream release yet), add its ID below with a comment explaining the
# blocker and what unblocks it.
